candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; classic sales revenue description and matches income row amounts.
Appears to duplicate Sales revenue values; included as secondary fallback label for revenue per instructions.
Sales and marketing is an operating expense, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Finance income, not operating revenue; excluded.
Tax expense, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the year
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue line.

variables.notes: Sales revenue is the clearest top-line revenue label. income mirrors the same values and is included as a fallback per the revenue priority rule.

candidates.why: Generic operating expense; likely part of SG&A, not clearly direct cost of sales.
Net operating income/expense line, not a pure cost-of-sales line.
Residual operating expenses; likely SG&A components, not explicit COGS.
Net operating income/expense subtotal, not a direct cost of sales.
A specific overhead component, not full COGS.
Balance sheet inventory, not an income statement cost line.
Balance sheet liability, not COGS.

variables.notes: The income statement does not present a distinct cost of goods sold or cost of sales line; operating expenses are grouped into payroll, services, premises, sales & marketing, etc. Therefore COGS is treated as not separately disclosed and set to 0 per instructions.

candidates.why: Operating revenue, not SG&A expense.
Net operating income/expense line including income; not a pure SG&A component and should be excluded.
Explicitly labeled operating expenses; good SG&A residual bucket.
Share-based comp is a classic SG&A component (personnel/overhead).
Balance sheet liability related to payroll, not an income statement expense line.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Main SG&A-type overhead is broken into several operating expense components: payroll, services, premises/supplies, sales & marketing, and other expenses. These, plus the residual bucket 'Other operating expenses - rest' and 'Share-Based Compensation', best represent SG&A. An explicit single SG&A line does not exist, so multiple component rows are selected from outside the suggested candidate list, triggering manual review as required. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Salaries and other payroll costs, [Income Statement] Services, [Income Statement] Premises, Supplies, [Income Statement] Sales and marketing, [Income Statement] Other expenses

candidates.why: Capitalized development asset, not current-period R&D expense.
Gross capitalized development costs (asset); not an expense line.
Accumulated amortization/impairment of development costs (contra-asset), not the period’s R&D expense line.
Balancing asset value; not an expense line.

variables.notes: No explicit research & development expense line appears on the income statement. Development cost lines are balance sheet items (capitalized R&D), not current-period expense. XRD is therefore set to 0 per instructions.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Component of interest expense related to lease liabilities; good secondary label for XINT if main line is missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; tertiary fallback.
Interest income, opposite sign of interest expense; not used for XINT.
Balancing value for interest expense; useful if primary interest expense line is missing in some years.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Ordered priority list: main Interest Expense, then lease-related Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities, then the balancing Interest Expense line as a final fallback. Interest Income is excluded as it is not an expense.

candidates.why: Represents total shareholders’ equity attributable to owners; best proxy for book equity excluding non-controlling interests (which are not separately disclosed).
Technical balancing item; not the main equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row for the accounting equation, not equity itself.
Total of liabilities plus equity; not pure equity.

variables.notes: Total shareholders equity is used as book equity; there is no separate non-controlling interest line, so this is assumed to be equity attributable to owners.
No line for non-controlling interests or minority interest appears on the balance sheet; MIB is therefore set to 0 per instructions.
